report.summary: Community cycle v2 completed: Drafted 4 tweets (#239-242) covering Q1 close setup thread, whale supply squeeze, CLARITY Act explainer, and 604-page milestone. Newsletter v40 full weekly digest drafted for Thu Apr 3. Created SVG social card: Q1 2026 The Setup (1200x630, fear vs setup dual-column with historical comparison). Discord/TG Sunday evening update drafted. 604 pages published, 242 total tweets drafted, 55 SVG cards created.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #239: Q1 Close 'The Setup' Thread (4 parts) — BTC $66,008 (-24.6% YTD), ETH $1,985 (-60%), SOL $83 (-72%), F&G 12 (51-day ATR). Underneath: 270K BTC whale accumulation, 5.88% exchange supply ATL, 16 tokens = commodities, CLARITY Act deal, NC Bitcoin Reserve Act. Historical parallels: post-FTX +94%, COVID +1,180%, 2018 +306%. Q2 catalysts: CLARITY vote, 126 ETF filings, $400B ETF AUM target. Links to fear-greed-timeline + dca-calculator. Scheduled: Sun Mar 29, 8PM ET.

Tweet #240: Whale Supply Squeeze — Exchange supply at all-time low 5.88%, historical avg +127% 6-month forward return at similar levels, 270K BTC accumulated in 30 days. Links to whale-tracker. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 10AM ET.

Tweet #241: CLARITY Act Explainer — Tillis + Alsobrooks stablecoin yield deal reached, Senate vote window May-June 2026, DeFi lending clarity, banks can offer crypto yield. Links to crypto-regulations-2026-guide. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 2PM ET.
Tweet #242: 604 Published Pages Milestone — All free, no signup. DCA calculator, fear index, whale tracker, options calc highlighted. Bear markets are for building. Scheduled: Tue Mar 31, 12PM ET.
Discord/TG: Sunday Evening Community Update — Full market snapshot, Q1 close recap, CLARITY Act + NC Reserve Act, whale accumulation divergence, 604 pages milestone, next week content preview.

Newsletter v40: Full weekly digest — Subject: 'Q1 Closes, But the Setup Gets Stronger'. Market pulse, regulation watch (CLARITY Act, NC Reserve Act, SEC commodity ruling), 604 pages live, featured reads (bear market guide, whale tracker, regulations guide), degen corner with historical fear recovery data. Send: Thu Apr 3, 10AM ET.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Q1 2026 The Setup (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism dual-column design. Left 'THE FEAR' (red): BTC $66,008 (-24.6% YTD), ETH $1,985 (-60%), F&G 12/100 (51-day ATR), $14.16B options expiry ($451M liquidated). Right 'THE SETUP' (green): 270K BTC whale accumulation (30d), 5.88% exchange supply (ATL), CLARITY Act deal reached, 16 tokens = commodities. Purple historical bar: post-FTX +94%, COVID +1,180%, 2018 +306%, median 90d +38.4%. Cyan Q2 catalysts strip. Footer: 604 pages, 242 tweets, 55 visuals. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-29-social-card-q1-close-setup.svg
